name: Chow Len the Prophet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>予</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>言</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>僧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> チョウレン
desc: Once per turn: You can declare either Spell or Trap, then target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; look at that target, and if it is the declared card type, that card cannot be activated this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can declare either Spell or Trap, then target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; look at that target, and if it is the declared card type, that card cannot be activated this turn.
eff: Once per turn: You can declare either Spell or Trap, then target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; look at that target, and if it is the declared card type, that card cannot be activated this turn.

sets.set: Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
